title: Rana: The Legend of Shadow Lake
original_title: Rana: The Legend of Shadow Lake
overview: After a terrifying youth encounter with a strange half man/half frog monster living in a lake that killed his father, a young man returns to search for the monster's hidden treasure, and to see if the legendary creature really was killed.
